title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A video demonstrates building a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, and workflows using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The creator shows how to avoid repeated AI prompts and reduce costs by leveraging Softr's database automation and vibe coding features for internal tools and portals.
